name: Dough Enhancer
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Store the mixture in a tightly closed glass jar.
3. Add to breadmaker at the amount equal to yeast, along with other dry ingredients.
4. Start the machine and bake according to your breadmaking instructions.
Apparently, the ginger activates the yeast, making it work more quickly. The ascorbic acid strengthens the gluten, while lecithin helps the oil cause the strands of gluten to slip against each other more easily, resulting in better rising.
